svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(235, 248, 255), rgb(17, 28, 34)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 112, 242), rgb(70, 166, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(235, 248, 255), rgb(17, 28, 34)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 112, 242), rgb(70, 166, 255));

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(127, 0, 255), rgb(255, 159, 255));
